channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Bruce Springsteen, U2, Stevie Wonder, More Stars to Perform at Obama Presidential Center’s Opening
item.description: 🎶 Legends unite for a historic celebration at the Obama Presidential Center! Are you ready to groove with Bruce, U2, and Stevie Wonder? 🌟 #MusicLegends #ObamaPresidentialCenter

item.title: Billy Jones Forever Foundation scholarship & mentorship fund established
item.description: 🌟 Music education just got a major boost! Celebrate the new Billy Jones Forever Foundation scholarship & mentorship fund 🎶✨ #MusicEducation #SupportTalent

item.title: Squirrel Flower Announces New Album Say a Prayer to the Gods of Getting Going
item.description: 🎶 Ready to vibe! Squirrel Flower is blessing us with new tunes! 🌟 #MusicNews #NewAlbumAlert

item.title: James Murphy & Questlove Are DJing Phish’s Mexican Resort Festival
item.description: 🎶 Get ready to dance under the sun with @lcdsoundsystem's James Murphy and @questlove at Phish's Mexican festival! 🏝️ #SummerVibes

item.title: Pulp Announce Live Album And Film
item.description: 🎥🎶 Dive into the ultimate Pulp experience with their upcoming live album and film! Get ready to relive the magic! 🌟 #Pulp #MusicNews
